channel.title: Blog on Kanch's Cloud Race Musings
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Kanch's Cloud Race Musings

item.title: Don't Just Chat, Charm: Crafting Virtual Agents with Personality
item.description: How to build conversational agents that go beyond basic chatbots to deliver engaging user experiences.

item.title: A Typology of AI Agents
item.description: Classifying agent architectures by complexity, from simple reflex agents to fully autonomous systems.

item.title: WTH are AI Agents?
item.description: Breaking down what AI agents really are and how they work under the hood.

item.title: AI Agents 101
item.description: How generative AI application patterns evolved from foundation model calls to autonomous multi-agent systems.

item.title: Product Manager - Product Builder Defined
item.description: Redefining the product manager role in the age of AI-driven development.

item.title: Product Manager to Product Builder
item.description: Why Product Managers need to evolve into Product Builders in the AI era.

item.title: Generative AI and LLMs - Excitement and Panic
item.description: A primer on what Generative AI and LLMs are, the history, key players, enterprise impact, and the controversies surrounding this space.

item.title: Prompt Engineering 101
item.description: Getting started with prompt engineering techniques for large language models.

item.title: This Week with Generative AI
item.description: Weekly roundup of developments in the Generative AI space.

item.title: Finally GREENED
item.description: The 17-year journey to a Green Card and lessons for those on the same path.

item.title: Career is in Our Hands
item.description: A framework for becoming a technology leader beyond the traditional management ladder.

item.title: Five Steps to Get You Started
item.description: A practical five-step guide to kickstart your machine learning journey.

item.title: Key Roles in an AI Driven Organization
item.description: Understanding team structures and key roles in an AI-driven organization.

item.title: GCP Data Engineering - Round 2!
item.description: Tips and resources for renewing the Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer certification.

item.title: GCP Machine Learning Engineer!
item.description: Preparation guide and key topics for the Google Cloud ML Engineer certification.
